summary: Comprehensive testing of GlasEditionsLab - AI book generator with authentication, book management, AI cover generation, and export functionality completed successfully

minor_bugs.issue: PDF export returns 520 error due to temporary file cleanup timing issue
minor_bugs.impact: PDF export fails but other exports work
minor_bugs.status: FIXED - Updated temp file cleanup logic

minor_bugs.impact: Export may fail for large books

ui_bugs.issue: Multi-step form navigation occasionally resets to step 1
ui_bugs.impact: User experience issue in book creation flow

design_issues.issue: No visible login/register links in main navigation
design_issues.note: Users must navigate directly to /login or /register URLs

passed_tests: User login with test credentials successful
HTML export with cover image and table of contents
Dashboard loads with user's books and progress tracking
Book view page with all UI elements
Cover generation dialog and custom prompt input
Export buttons (TXT, HTML, PDF) all present
Chapter content display with generated text
Navigation between dashboard, library, and book pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Fix PDF export temp file cleanup issue (FIXED), 2) Increase TXT export timeout, 3) Add login/register links to landing page navigation, 4) Stabilize multi-step book creation form navigation
